notes:
trở lại = to come back / return to a place, person, or activity. It focuses on going back to where you were before.

It’s a verb, often used with places, time points, or situations. You can also use it for abstract things like feelings, habits, or problems coming back.

Close synonym: quay lại (more casual and common in speech). Opposite idea: rời đi (leave).
exampleSentencesTranslated: I will come back home this weekend.
If you forget something, you can come back to get it anytime.
After traveling, she feels very happy to come back to work.

definitions.en: to return or come back to a place.
definitions.vi: trở về hoặc quay lại một nơi nào đó.
definitions.es: regresar o volver a un lugar.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ trở lại vào ngày mai.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ vào tháng tới.

notes_md:
**trở lại** = to come back / return to a place, person, or activity. It focuses on going back to where you were before.

It’s a verb, often used with places, time points, or situations. You can also use it for abstract things like feelings, habits, or problems coming back.


Close synonym: **quay lại** (more casual and common in speech). Opposite idea: **rời đi** (leave).
exampleSentences: Anh sẽ trở lại nhà vào cuối tuần này.
Nếu em quên đồ, em có thể trở lại lấy bất cứ lúc nào.
Sau khi đi du lịch, chị cảm thấy rất vui khi được trở lại công việc.
